etymology.description: semantic 艹(艹) (cǎo, "grass") + phonetic 伏(伏) (fú, "conceal") -> poria root
etymology.interpretation: 茯(fú, "poria root") combines 艹(艹) (cǎo, "grass"), indicating a plant-related meaning, with 伏(伏) (fú, "conceal"), which provides the phonetic sound. The poria root is used in traditional medicine and is often found concealed underground, which might connect the semantic field with its natural occurrence.

examples.chinese: 茯苓是中药中常用的材料(茯苓是中藥中常用的材料)。
examples.pinyin: Fúlíng shì zhōngyào zhōng cháng yòng de cáiliào.
examples.english: Poria root is a commonly used ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.

examples.chinese: 在市场上(在市場上)，你可以买到优质的茯苓(你可以買到優質的茯苓)。
examples.pinyin: Zài shìchǎng shàng, nǐ kěyǐ mǎi dào yōuzhì de fúlíng.
examples.english: In the market, you can buy high-quality poria root.

examples.chinese: 茯苓对身体有很多好处(茯苓對身體有很多好處)，例如增强免疫力(例如增強免疫力)。
examples.pinyin: Fúlíng duì shēntǐ yǒu hěn duō hǎochù, lìrú zēngqiáng miǎnyì lì.
examples.english: Poria root has many health benefits, such as boosting the immune system.
